holdings.infoBox: FTRI is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Freeport-McMoRan stock at 11.80%, Corteva at 10.23%, Agnico Eagle Mines at 7.75%, Nutrien at 6.51%, and American Water Works Company at 4.54%.

overview.description: The First Trust Indxx Global Natural Resources Income ETF (FTRI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of natural resource stocks selected by dividend yield and weighted by market cap. FTRI was launched on Mar 12, 2010 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Indxx Global Natural Resources Income Index
